Dr. Mundo.lane_plan: Farm safely early, poke with Q when possible, and avoid wasting mana into Mundo's sustain.
Dr. Mundo.build_direction: Armor if the enemy team is physical damage heavy, but consider magic resist or mixed tank items if Mundo and others deal magic damage. Anti-heal can help if Mundo gets ahead.
tips: Do not spam Q too much early or you will run out of mana before Mundo runs out of health.
Dodge Mundo Q when possible because repeated cleavers will make lane hard to control.
Your level 6 is better for setting up jungle ganks or roaming than trying to solo kill Mundo.

Sett.lane_plan: Farm safely early, poke with Q, and avoid extended melee trades.
Sett.build_direction: Armor and health. Anti-heal is optional if Sett has strong sustain from items or runes.
tips: Use Q to poke and slow Sett before backing away.
Avoid standing in the center of Sett's W.
Your level 6 engage is stronger when Sett's Flash is down.

Nasus.lane_plan: Pressure Nasus early with Q poke and do not let him stack for free.
Nasus.build_direction: Armor and health. Anti-heal can help later if Nasus becomes hard to kill.
tips: Use Q to punish Nasus when he walks up for cannon or melee minions.
Try to crash waves and roam before Nasus becomes too strong.
Respect Nasus after level 6 if he has stacked safely.

Kayle.lane_plan: Punish Kayle before level 6 and use Q poke to stop her from scaling for free.
Kayle.build_direction: Magic resist if Kayle is AP, armor if she goes AD/on-hit, and general tank if your team needs frontline.
tips: Use Q to poke Kayle whenever she walks up to last-hit.
Look for an all-in at level 6 if Kayle is low or her Flash is down.
Do not waste your full combo into Kayle ultimate.

Aatrox.lane_plan: Avoid Aatrox Q sweet spots and use Q to trade when his cooldowns are down.
Aatrox.build_direction: Armor, health, and anti-heal if Aatrox is winning trades or healing heavily.
tips: Dodge sideways instead of straight back against Aatrox Q.
Use Q movement speed to avoid his second and third Q.
Your ultimate can interrupt his pressure or set up a jungle gank.

Renekton.lane_plan: Survive the early levels and avoid trading when Renekton has high fury.
Renekton.build_direction: Armor and health. Bramble Vest can be useful if Renekton is taking aggressive sustain trades.
tips: Respect Renekton's level 3 trade with fury.
Use E after Renekton dashes in to reduce his attack speed during trades.
Once you have armor, Renekton becomes much less threatening.

Jax.lane_plan: Use your armor scaling and E attack speed slow to survive Jax's early trades.
Jax.build_direction: Armor and health early, with magic resist later if Jax builds mixed damage.
tips: Use E when Jax jumps on you to reduce his follow-up damage.
Do not waste autos into Jax Counter Strike.
Your ultimate is strong for locking Jax down before he can take over a fight.

Garen.lane_plan: Poke Garen with Q, avoid taking free Q trades, and use your armor to outscale his early damage.
Garen.build_direction: Armor and health. Anti-heal is usually not required unless Garen has strong healing from items.
tips: Use Q to stop Garen from freely walking into melee range.
Back away when Garen activates Q so he cannot silence you for free.
Do not stay low in lane because Garen's ultimate can execute you.

Darius.lane_plan: Farm safely, avoid extended trades, and use Q to stay out of Darius pull range.
Darius.build_direction: Armor, health, and anti-heal if Darius is healing too much from Q or items.
tips: Do not let Darius stack his passive in long fights.
Stay away from the outer edge of Darius Q to deny his heal.
Use your ultimate defensively if needed to escape or stop his all-in.

Malphite.lane_plan: Farm safely, poke with Q, and outscale Malphite through sustain and health stacking.
Malphite.build_direction: Health, magic resist if Malphite is AP, and armor if the enemy team is mostly physical damage.
tips: Use Q to farm and poke Malphite when he walks up.
Avoid taking repeated Q poke for free before your sustain is strong.
Malphite has stronger engage at level 6, so ping when he leaves lane.

Sett.lane_plan: Avoid extended melee trades early and use Q to farm from range until you have health items.
Sett.build_direction: Health and armor. Build anti-heal only if Sett has heavy sustain from items or runes.
tips: Do not stand in the center of Sett's W because the true damage can beat your healing.
Use Q to slow Sett when he tries to run you down.
Your passive can block Sett's E or R crowd control if timed well.

Nasus.lane_plan: Pressure Nasus early and punish him when he walks up for stacks.
Nasus.build_direction: Health, armor, and anti-heal if Nasus gets strong sustain items.
tips: Use Q to harass Nasus every time he walks up to last-hit.
Do not let him free farm under no pressure in the early lane.
Respect Nasus after level 6 if he has stacked safely.

Kayle.lane_plan: Punish Kayle before level 6 and deny her free scaling whenever possible.
Kayle.build_direction: Health and magic resist if Kayle is building AP. Armor can help if she goes on-hit AD.
tips: Walk up early and force Kayle to farm with abilities instead of autos.
Use Q to slow Kayle before she can kite away.
After level 6, avoid chasing too far during her ultimate.

Aatrox.lane_plan: Play around Aatrox Q cooldowns and avoid getting hit by the sweet spots.
Aatrox.build_direction: Health, armor, and early anti-heal if Aatrox is winning trades.
tips: Use Q to farm safely when Aatrox has lane control.
Dodge sideways against Aatrox Q instead of running straight back.
Your passive can block Aatrox W pull if it is available.

Renekton.lane_plan: Survive Renekton's early pressure and avoid fighting him when his fury bar is high.
Renekton.build_direction: Health and armor. Anti-heal is useful if Renekton builds sustain.
tips: Respect Renekton's level 3 all-in with fury.
Use Q to farm when he is threatening dash trades.
Once you have armor and health, you can start taking longer trades.

Jax.lane_plan: Use Q to control space and avoid extended fights when Jax has lethal tempo or his passive stacked.
Jax.build_direction: Health and armor early, with magic resist later if Jax builds mixed damage.
tips: Do not auto Jax during Counter Strike unless you have to.
Use Q to slow Jax after he jumps on you.
Your passive can block Jax E stun if it is available.

Garen.lane_plan: Farm safely, poke with Q, and avoid letting Garen get free short trades with Q and E.
Garen.build_direction: Health and armor. Anti-heal is optional if Garen has strong healing from items.
tips: Use Q to stop Garen from freely walking into melee range.
Back away when Garen activates Q so he cannot silence you for free.
Be careful when low because Garen's ultimate can finish you through your healing.

Darius.lane_plan: Avoid long trades and use Q to farm safely until you have enough health and armor.
Darius.build_direction: Health, armor, and anti-heal if Darius is sustaining heavily through Q and items.
tips: Do not let Darius stack his passive in extended fights.
Stay inside or outside the edge of Darius Q to avoid the heal and heavy damage.
Use Q to slow Darius when he tries to pull or chase you.

Malphite.lane_plan: Farm safely early, avoid taking too much Q poke, and look for short trades when Malphite uses abilities on the wave.
Malphite.build_direction: Health, attack damage, and magic resist if Malphite is AP. Armor is better if the enemy team is mostly physical damage.
tips: Use Q movement speed to close the gap after Malphite uses Q.
Avoid wasting full trades when Malphite has passive shield up.
Be careful after level 6 because Malphite can set up ganks or all-ins with his ultimate.

Sett.lane_plan: Take short trades with Q and E, then back away before Sett can fully stack grit.
Sett.build_direction: Health and armor. Anti-heal can help if Sett builds sustain or takes long trades.
tips: Do not stand in the center of Sett's W.
Use Q silence before Sett can return damage with abilities.
Avoid extended fights where Sett can use his passive and W at full value.

Dr. Mundo.lane_plan: Trade early before Mundo gets too tanky, but do not chase through repeated cleavers.
Dr. Mundo.build_direction: Health, damage, and anti-heal if Mundo becomes hard to kill.
tips: Use Q to dodge or sidestep Mundo cleavers when possible.
Do not use your full combo into Mundo passive if you need the silence to stick.
Your ultimate can finish Mundo if you wait until after his healing has dropped him low.

Nasus.lane_plan: Pressure Nasus early, deny stacks, and crash waves so he cannot farm for free.
Nasus.build_direction: Damage early, then health and armor. Anti-heal can help later if Nasus has strong sustain.
tips: Use Q and E to punish Nasus every time he walks up for stacks.
Do not let the wave sit near his tower for free.
Respect Nasus after level 6 if he has stacked safely.

Kayle.lane_plan: Punish Kayle before level 6 and force her away from the wave as much as possible.
Kayle.build_direction: Damage early, then magic resist if Kayle is AP or armor if she is on-hit AD.
tips: Use Q movement speed to force trades before Kayle gets range.
Try to freeze or slow push so Kayle has to walk up dangerously.
Do not waste your ultimate into Kayle ultimate.

Aatrox.lane_plan: Avoid Aatrox Q sweet spots and look for short trades when his Q is on cooldown.
Aatrox.build_direction: Health, armor, and anti-heal if Aatrox is healing heavily.
tips: Dodge sideways against Aatrox Q instead of running straight back.
Use Q silence before trading so Aatrox cannot easily chain abilities.
Do not take extended fights during Aatrox ultimate unless he is already low.

Renekton.lane_plan: Respect Renekton's early fury trades and take short trades after he uses cooldowns.
Renekton.build_direction: Health and armor. Anti-heal can help if Renekton builds sustain.
tips: Avoid fighting Renekton when his fury bar is high.
Use W to reduce incoming burst if he dashes in.
After early armor, his trades become easier to survive.

Jax.lane_plan: Take short trades, avoid hitting into Counter Strike, and back away before Jax extends the fight.
Jax.build_direction: Health and armor early, with magic resist later if Jax builds mixed damage.
tips: Do not auto or commit into Jax Counter Strike.
Use Q movement speed to disengage after short trades.
Your silence can stop Jax from immediately using abilities if you time it before his engage.

Darius.lane_plan: Avoid extended fights and do not let Darius stack his passive for free.
Darius.build_direction: Health, armor, and anti-heal if Darius is healing too much from Q or items.
tips: Stay away from the outer edge of Darius Q to deny his heal.
Use Q movement speed defensively if he tries to pull you in.
Only all-in when Darius is low enough for your ultimate to finish him quickly.

Yasuo.lane_plan: Play for short trades, punish Yasuo when his shield is down, and avoid fighting inside a large enemy minion wave.
Yasuo.build_direction: Health and armor early. Damage is fine if you are ahead, but tankier bruiser items make the lane safer.
tips: Auto or tap E to remove Yasuo's passive shield before using your main trade.
Use Q silence before Yasuo can dash around or stack another Q.
Do not chase Yasuo through a big wave because his E mobility is strongest there.
